name: Hollywood Pawn Shop & Jewelry
description_short: Family-owned Los Angeles pawn shop offering instant cash loans, jewelry sales, and repair services with 15+ years in business and competitive rates.
description_long:
Hollywood Pawn Shop & Jewelry is a family-owned pawn operation based in the Los Angeles area (serving Glendale, Burbank, Pasadena, and North Hollywood) with over 15 years of operating history. The business positions itself as a trusted local alternative to larger financial institutions for consumers needing quick liquidity or seeking quality secondhand goods.

The company offers three primary services: (1) Instant pawn loans against personal collateral with stated low rates and no credit checks, (2) Direct sales of items including jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, designer items, and collectibles, and (3) Jewelry repair including watch battery replacement, chain repair, stone-setting, and ring-resizing. They operate 6-7 days per week and maintain an online inquiry system for cash quotes.

The shop distinguishes itself through claims of competitive pricing, professional service standards, a large inventory of quality items, fast/confidential transactions, and experienced staff. Their marketing emphasizes a clean, safe physical space and honest appraisals. According to their stated metrics, they have written 118,572 loans with an average monthly interest rate of 4%.

As a pawn shop, this business serves the traditional collateral-lending function—providing short-term liquidity to consumers willing to temporarily surrender possessions. Customer testimonials report positive experiences with appraisals and service. However, consumers should understand that pawn loans are secured transactions where failure to repay results in loss of the pledged item, and the stated 4% monthly rate translates to approximately 48% annualized if the loan terms align with monthly periods.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No credit check required for pawn loans—accessible to consumers with poor or no credit history
Fast approval and same-day cash disbursement stated in customer testimonials
Jewelry repair services offered in-house at advertised customer-friendly prices
Open 6-7 days per week for customer convenience
Large inventory of secondhand items across multiple categories (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments)
Online cash quote system allows pre-assessment before visiting the physical location
Family-owned business with 15+ years of operating history and stated strong community reputation
cons: Monthly interest rate of 4% (48% annualized) is high relative to traditional personal loans, though standard for pawn lending
Loss of collateral is automatic if loan is not repaid—high stakes for consumers in financial distress
Jewelry repair pricing claims ('customer-friendly prices') are not itemized or verified on the website
Limited transparency on loan term lengths, maximum loan amounts, or default consequences
Reviews are exclusively positive with no negative feedback present, suggesting possible curation bias
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history who need short-term cash within hours
People with unused jewelry, electronics, or collectibles who prefer direct sale over auction or online platforms
Individuals seeking jewelry repair services who want same-location lending and resale options
Borrowers who need small loans ($100-$5,000 range) for temporary cash flow emergencies
diagnosis: Hollywood Pawn Shop & Jewelry is best for consumers with poor/no credit needing immediate cash who own valuable collateral they can temporarily pledge, or buyers seeking discounted secondhand luxury goods. The primary caveat is that pawn loans carry high annualized interest rates (48%+ stated) and risk total loss of the pledged item if repayment occurs late or not at all—making this suitable only for short-term emergencies, not ongoing credit needs.
services: Instant pawn loans with no credit check required
Direct purchase and sale of jewelry (gold, diamonds, watches, chains)
Direct purchase and sale of electronics
Direct purchase and sale of tools
Direct purchase and sale of musical instruments
Direct purchase and sale of collectibles
Direct purchase and sale of designer items
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
